docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF VENTURA, ALBA AS TO DEFENDANT CEJA, CASIMIRO AN INDIVIDUAL DBA MCMAINTENANCE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
